scripts.db-test: node -r dotenv/config -e "import pkg from 'pg'; const { Client } = pkg; const c = new Client({ connectionString: process.env.NEON_DATABASE_URL, ssl: true }); c.connect().then(() => { console.log('✅ NEON CONNECTED'); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.error('❌ CONNECTION FAILED', e); process.exit(1); })"
